series_metadata.series_title: Data Processing Hardware and Software Documentation
series_metadata.series_description: The Data Processing Hardware and Software Documentation are records documenting the use, operation, and maintenance of the BWC data processing equipment including operating manuals for hardware and software, hardware/operating system requirements, hardware configurations, and equipment control systems. Reference General Schedule IT-OP-02.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain Data Processing Hardware and Software Documentation until it is no longer compatible with new up-dated technology used by the BWC and all data contained on the incompatible Data Processing Hardware and Software Documentation has been transferred to a medium compatible with current BWC technology, then destroy. ; Paper: Retain Data Processing Hardware and Software Documentation until it is no longer compatible with new up-dated technology used by the BWC and all data contained on the incompatible Data Processing Hardware and Software Documentation has been transferred to a medium compatible with current BWC technology, then destroy., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Recycle
